stimulus: During a 2017 excavation in northern Peru, archaeologist Daniela Bocanegra and her team uncovered the tomb of a Moche-era woman buried with elaborate ceremonial weapons signaling that she had held a leading military role. This finding may persuade scholars who have long maintained that pre-Columbian Andean warfare was conducted exclusively by men to ______blank that assumption and consider a broader range of evidence regarding women's participation in combat leadership.
stem: Which choice completes the text with the most logical and precise word or phrase?
rationale:
Choice B is correct. "Relinquish" means to give up. The new finding directly conflicts with the long-held assumption that Andean warfare was exclusively male, so scholars persuaded by the discovery would set that assumption aside and weigh broader evidence, as the text suggests.

Choice A is incorrect; defending the assumption is what these scholars would stop doing in light of the new finding. Choice C is incorrect because "certify" means to formally confirm, which contradicts the persuasive effect described. Choice D is incorrect because "obscure" the assumption does not match the scholarly reconsideration the text describes.
